heading: Procedures for notification of exposure
label: 300ff–134 Procedures for notification of exposure
notes: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title

children.heading: Contents of notification to officer
children.label: a Contents of notification to officer

children.text: the name of the infectious disease involved; and
the date on which the victim of the emergency involved was transported by emergency response employees to the medical facility involved.
the medical facility sending the notification shall, upon sending the notification, inform the designated officer to whom the notification is sent of the fact that the notification has been sent; and

such designated officer shall, not later than 10 days after being informed by the medical facility that the notification has been sent, inform such medical facility whether the designated officer has received the notification.
